items.summary: In the backend Motoko actor (backend/main.mo), add a new public update function `cancelOneOrderTest()` that calls `cancelOrder()` on the ICDex canister at 'jgxow-pqaaa-aaaar-qahaq-cai' with a single hardcoded order ID (e.g., orderId = 0). This function must be completely self-contained and must not modify any existing functions including tradingLoop(). It serves only as a proof of concept that the cancelOrder() call compiles and executes without budget_exceeded errors.
